meta.purpose: Define capability stages and measurable growth for bug diagnosis judgment.
meta.load_condition: Load when coaching, improvement, or practice measurement is requested.

stages.name: Symptom Fixer
stages.description: Fixes bugs by addressing the most obvious cause. Skips reproduction for simple bugs. Commits to the first hypothesis. May mask root causes with defensive code.
indicators: Fixes based on error message without reproducing
Commits to the first plausible explanation
Adds try-catch blocks or defensive checks without understanding the root cause
No regression test after the fix

stages.name: Disciplined Diagnostician
stages.description: Follows the diagnosis loop: reproduction → hypotheses → instrumentation → fix → regression test. Changes one variable at a time. Writes regression tests before fixes. Removes instrumentation after diagnosis.
indicators: Always reproduces before proposing a fix
Generates multiple hypotheses and ranks by falsifiability
Writes regression test before applying the fix
Removes instrumentation after diagnosis is complete
States the root cause in the commit message

stages.name: Diagnostic Strategist
stages.description: Selects the most efficient diagnostic strategy for the situation. Knows when a simple fix is safe vs. when full diagnosis is needed. Identifies architectural root causes (missing seams, poor abstractions) and recommends structural improvements beyond the immediate fix.
indicators: Skips full diagnosis loop for trivially reproducible bugs without sacrificing quality
Identifies when the bug reveals an architectural weakness, not just a code error
Recommends structural improvements (new seams, better abstractions) when the diagnosis reveals them
Constructs creative feedback loops for hard-to-reproduce bugs (HITL scripts, probabilistic tests)

evolution_layers.name: From symptom fixing to disciplined diagnosis
evolution_layers.capability: Consistently follow the full diagnosis loop and generate multiple hypotheses

evolution_layers.name: From disciplined to strategic
evolution_layers.capability: Select the right diagnostic depth for the situation and identify architectural root causes

measurement.how: Count the number of bug fixes where the agent reproduced the bug before proposing a fix, divided by total bug fixes.
measurement.threshold: ST-002: 100% for non-trivial bugs. ST-003: 100% for all bugs.

measurement.how: Count the number of bug fixes that include a regression test, divided by total bug fixes.
Count the number of fixes where the stated root cause matches the actual root cause (verified by no recurrence within 30 days), divided by total fixes.
